reviews.comment:
Paso obligado, atencion regular, OJO   solo reciben efectivo ! los tachos de basura fuera del local repletos, poco personal.

(Translated by Google)
Must-stop, average service, NOTE: they only accept cash! The trash cans outside the premises are overflowing, and there are few staff.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) This is the second time we've passed by there... and both times they're out of gas, and the convenience store only has one person working there, which causes a really long wait. I recommend having your motorcycle fully fueled up beforehand to avoid a surprise there... because it's ridiculous.

(Original)
A segunda vez que passamos por aí...   e nas duas vezes não tem gasolina e na conveniência o atendimento é feito só por uma pessoa o que gera muuuuuita demora, recomendo estar com a motocicleta abastecida antes para não tomar susto lá...   pois é ridículo
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdGF1X1V3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Be patient while waiting to be served! The place is very high up and cold. It opens around 8:00 AM and closes around 9:00 PM. A truly inhospitable place!

(Original)
Tenha paciência para ser atendido! Lugar muito alto e frio. Abre por volta de 8:00 e fecha pelas 21:00. Lugarejo inóspito!
